case_title: MOHAMAD NASSIM AMIALI VS. ALISSA KARGBO

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,652.90 FILED BY AMIALI, MOHAMAD NASSIM AS TO DEFENDANT KARGBO, ALISSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED FEB-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KARGBO, ALISSA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2019 - PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRESENT IN PRO PER, WERE SWORN AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR. 18, 2019 BY JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMIALI, MOHAMAD NASSIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARGBO, ALISSA $1,857.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,967.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KARGBO, ALISSA
